title: I made a mistake while creating a product, what should I do?
bodyHtml:
If you find this article useful, hit the like button at the end to let us know.


Just realised you made a mistake when creating a product? Don’t sweat it — here’s what to do. 
 

Step 1. Remove the stock count from the listing in question so that customers don’t order the item. 

Step 2. Archive the listing by selecting “Archive offer”. 

Step 3. Create a new offer by creating a new product or listing (using the BMID of an existing product). 
 

Learn how to create a product on Back Market

Learn how to create a listing on Back Market
 

Note that if you want to keep the same SKU reference, you’ll need to change the SKU of the erroneous listing by adding — for example — "old" or "archived" to the SKU. To do so, select the title of the listing and change the name in the “Unique ID” field.
